title: Looking for monday.com integration partner
excerpt: Needed help in integrating third party applications with monday. Can anyone help me find the right monday.com partner? I have been looking for a certified partner for a couple of months but struggling to find the right o…

posts.author: alinadsouza (Alina D)
posts.cookedHtml: Needed help in integrating third party applications with monday. Can anyone help me find the right monday.com partner? I have been looking for a certified partner for a couple of months but struggling to find the right one that understands the technical challenges I’m dealing with.

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Alinadsouza.

Welcome to the monday community!

If you are planning to integrate monday. com with third-party applications, I would recommend you to connect with our seasoned professionals. We are a certified monday.com integration partner having rich experience in integrating popular applications with monday. com such as Salesforce, MailChimp, Zoom, Google Drive, Outlook, Quickbooks, and many more. Our prowess in monday. com integrations is unparalleled.

Whether you are looking for CRM Integration, App Integration, Email Integration, or Cloud Storage Integration with monday. com, we’ve got you covered. Connect with us today and seek end-to-end consultation from our experts.

Regards
Neelam B
Damco Solutions
Phone: +1 609 632 0350 | Email : info@damcogroup.com

posts.author: andres-at-connex (Andrés at Connex)
posts.cookedHtml:
alinadsouza:

integrating third party applications with monday

That’s easy with Zapier or Make.com. Book a time with me to understand if we are a fit https://go.oncehub.com/andres-berte

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @alinadsouza and welcome to the monday.com community forums! There are a lot of great partners within this community and I am sure you will find someone able to assist you.

Our experienced team at CarbonWeb has done a wide variety of custom integrations from every day business tools to outside the box connections. We truly enjoy watching a workflow come together through our component-by-component style of development.

If you would like to have a brief discussion about everything you are looking to create please schedule with me here: Consultation - Ricky

Good luck as you grow your monday.com environment!

Best regards,

Ricky Tomer

VP of Sales
Carbon Web Print, LLC
Schedule Consultation | Website
Phone: 440-462-7743 | Email : ricky@carbonweb.co

posts.author: jennaioi (Jenna Mac Killop)
posts.cookedHtml: We can help! We have developed a proprietary integration platform for your monday.com customers. If you’d like to chat more about how we can help, send an email to jenna@iointegration.com. Hope to hear from you!!

posts.author: jailynnlucidday (Jai-Lynn Hoops)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @alianadsouza !

Welcome to Monday.com’s Community! We are so glad to have you here and would love the opportunity to help you and your team with your third party integration. My company, Lucid Day, focuses in creating a collaborative workspace that will make the most of your monday.com account, while also teaching you the in’s and out’s of the system and how your solution works.

You can check out more about our services at monday.com Professional Services - Lucid Day and even book a FREE consultation with my colleague here.

Hope you have a great day!

Jai-Lynn Hoops, Lucid Day - Service Delivery Support Manager

posts.author: KayaW (Kaya Wong)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @alinadsouza

Welcome to the community! You are in the right place to find someone.
My name is Kaya with Kick Consulting. We are a Silver Partner with monday.com and have a global team of 14 (project/change managers, implementation specialists, developers) who have a tremendous amount of monday.com knowledge. We would love to help you set up and optimise your monday!

We offer a complimentary 1-hour initial meeting to discuss your pain points, needs, possible steps forward and options. You can book through this link. If you cannot find a suitable time, please let me know, and I will contact you with more availability.

I look forward to hearing from you.

Kaya
Kick Consulting

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @alinadsouza

upstream can help. We have our own full stack development team in house and are Platimum Partners, Preferred Partners and APAC Partner of the Year for 2020.

Our team has a wealth of integration experience and few of our own apps on the app center, but we specialise in custom integrations.

Please feel free to reach out to me directly via peta@upstreamtech.io or you can book a quick chat straight into my calendar using the below link. I’d be keen to understand more about what you’re doing.

Chat with Peta

Thanks and kind regards,
Peta - Account Executive at upstream

posts.author: Whitney (Whitney Blakeman)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @KayaW,

We have been using Monday as a CRM and Project Management tool for the last few months. We have some great systems in place but are in need of assistance with advanced integrations using Integromat to automate some of our processes.

To be transparent, we are looking for someone who can teach us how to set up these integrations so that we will not need to reach out every time there is a new ask. Is this something you can assist with? What time zone are you in?

Feel free to reach out at whitney@rmng.co

Look forward to hearing from you!

Whitney

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @Whitney and welcome to the monday.com community forums! I wanted to quickly throw my hat in the ring and introduce the team at CarbonWeb. We are monday.com partners based in Cleveland, OH that specialize in custom workflow development.

I know you mentioned that you are using monday as a CRM, but we recently launched our CarbonCRM Suite in the monday marketplace. My point being, we understand the importance of a strong base structure for your monday.com environment. We have a lot of experience with integromat (make.com) and I would be happy to discuss how our team can assist you.

If you would like to schedule a time with me to discuss please do so here: Consultation - Ricky

Good luck as you continue developing your environment and workflows!

posts.author: KayaW (Kaya Wong)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Whitney

My apologies for the late reply!
Yes that is something we can definitely support you with. I invite you to book here with me or my colleague Lauren for a complimentary call so we can discuss your integration needs.
Personally, I am in New Zealand, but our team is worldwide.

Kind regards,
Kaya

posts.author: Whitney (Whitney Blakeman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Kaya!

Thanks for your reply… we found someone who is helping us out with this.

We will reach out if any further support is needed.

Best,

Whitney

posts.cookedHtml: Hi @alinadsouza, Which integration specialist did you end up using and how was your experience? Thanks!
